iti33:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti33:1.3: "Endowed with two things, a person — as if carried off — is thus placed in heaven. Which two? Auspicious habits and auspicious views. Endowed with these two things, a person — as if carried off — is thus placed in heaven."
iti33:1.4: Auspicious habits and auspicious views: a person, discerning, endowed with these two things, at the break-up of the body reappears in heaven.
iti33:1.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
